issue_title: docs: fix filter test users links
issue_body_preview:
## Changes

We've moved the internal user filtering options from the root of the project settings to the project's product analytics page, so update any links found that previously routed this way. This was causing PostHog AI to trip up redirecting users to a page that did not contain the option t
test_description_zh: 在文档页面中找到涉及'过滤测试用户'相关的链接，点击这些链接，观察跳转后的页面是否正确显示对应的设置选项。
expected_result_zh: 点击文档中'过滤测试用户'相关的链接后，应正确跳转到项目产品分析设置页面，并能看到内部用户过滤选项，而不是跳转到一个不包含该选项的旧页面或404页面。
